samples.source_prompt: Rain pouring on a hard surface as a vehicle drives by while water splashes in the background.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 雨水倾泻在硬表面上，车辆驶过，背景有水花声
samples.target_prompt: Rain pouring on a hard surface as a train passes by on tracks while water splashes in the background.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 雨水倾泻在硬表面上，火车沿轨道驶过，背景有水花声

samples.source_prompt: Ducks quacking and birds tweeting as a crowd of people talk while a rooster crows in the background.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 鸭子呱呱叫，鸟儿啾啾鸣叫，背景中一群人在交谈，公鸡在叫。
samples.target_prompt: Ducks quacking and birds tweeting as children laugh while a rooster crows in the background.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 鸭子呱呱叫，鸟儿啾啾鸣叫，背景中孩子们在笑，公鸡在叫。

samples.source_prompt: A vehicle is running followed by the horn honking.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 车辆在运转，随后喇叭鸣响
samples.target_prompt: A motorcycle engine revs and accelerates, followed by the horn honking.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 摩托车发动机轰鸣加速，随后喇叭鸣响

samples.source_prompt: A woman talking followed by a bird whistling then a person whistling.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 一名女性说话，随后鸟儿吹口哨，再随后有人吹口哨
samples.target_prompt: A man laughing followed by a bird whistling then a person whistling.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 一名男子笑着，随后鸟儿吹口哨，再随后有人吹口哨

samples.source_prompt: A man speaks followed by a child crying and then a woman speaking.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 男子说话后接孩子哭泣 然后女人说话
samples.target_prompt: A man speaks followed by a toddler giggling and babbling and then a woman speaking.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 男子说话后接幼儿咯咯笑和咿呀学语 然后女人说话

samples.target_prompt: Cats meowing and then a violent thunderstorm.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 猫咪喵喵叫，然后暴风雨来袭。

samples.source_prompt: An adult female is speaking in a quiet environment.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 一名成年女性在安静环境中说话
samples.target_prompt: An adult female is speaking urgently amidst the chatter of a crowded cafe and the clatter of dishes.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 一名成年女性在拥挤咖啡馆的喧闹和餐具碰撞声中急促说话

samples.source_prompt: An insect buzzing as hollow wood clanks twice followed by a person gulping and a frog croaking proceeded by another insect buzzing and guitar music begins playing.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 昆虫嗡嗡作响 空木头敲击两下 随后有人吞咽和青蛙呱呱叫 接着又有昆虫嗡嗡作响并开始播放吉他音乐
samples.target_prompt: An insect buzzing as hollow wood clanks twice followed by a person gulping and a frog croaking proceeded by another insect buzzing and a soft, slow piano melody begins playing.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 昆虫嗡嗡作响 空木头敲击两下 随后有人吞咽和青蛙呱呱叫 接着又有昆虫嗡嗡作响并开始播放轻柔缓慢的钢琴旋律

samples.source_prompt: A woman speaks while a crowd talks and chuckles.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 一名女性说话，背景有人群交谈和轻笑
samples.target_prompt: A woman speaks over the distant roar of crashing ocean waves.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 一名女性在远处海浪拍岸的轰鸣声上方说话

samples.source_prompt: A child talking then a man speaking with bird sounds in the background.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 儿童说话后接男子说话 背景有鸟鸣
samples.target_prompt: A child talking then a woman speaking with bird sounds in the background.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 儿童说话后接女子说话 背景有鸟鸣

samples.source_prompt: A man talking followed by a faucet running.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 男子说话后接水龙头流水
samples.target_prompt: A man talking followed by a shower spray running.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 男子说话后接淋浴喷头流水

samples.source_prompt: A truck engine running followed by a truck horn honking.
samples.source_prompt_zh: 卡车发动机运转，随后卡车喇叭鸣响
samples.target_prompt: A truck engine running followed by a train horn honking.
samples.target_prompt_zh: 卡车发动机运转，随后火车汽笛鸣响
